main.summary: Configuration options for the CoreCache background worker.
main.remarks: Controls concurrency, retry behavior, queue capacity, and cache timeouts used by CacheWorker.

property.name: CacheTimeoutSeconds
property.summary: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a cache write to complete.

property.name: Capacity
property.summary: Maximum number of pending cache item requests allowed in the queue.

property.name: MaxAgeMinutes
property.summary: Maximum age in minutes a queued request may reach before it is discarded.

property.name: MaxConcurrency
property.summary: Maximum number of concurrent cache write operations performed by the worker.

property.name: MaxJitterMilliseconds
property.summary: Upper bound of random jitter applied to retry delays.

property.name: MaxRetries
property.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts for a failed cache write.

property.name: MinJitterMilliseconds
property.summary: Lower bound of random jitter applied to retry delays.

property.name: RetryBaseDelayMilliseconds
property.summary: Base delay in milliseconds used for computing retry backoff.
